members.name: ApplyIme
members.summary: Applies text from the [url=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Input_method]Input Method Editor[/url] (IME) and closes the IME if it is open.

members.name: CancelIme
members.summary: Closes the [url=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Input_method]Input Method Editor[/url] (IME) if it is open. Any text in the IME will be lost.

members.name: Clear
members.summary: Erases the [LineEdit]'s [member text].

members.name: DeleteCharAtCaret
members.summary: Deletes one character at the caret's current position (equivalent to pressing [kbd]Delete[/kbd]).

members.name: DeleteText
members.signature: public void DeleteText(int fromColumn, int toColumn)
members.summary: Deletes a section of the [member text] going from position [param from_column] to [param to_column]. Both parameters should be within the text's length.

members.name: Deselect
members.summary: Clears the current selection.

members.name: Edit
members.summary: Allows entering edit mode whether the [LineEdit] is focused or not. If [param hide_focus] is [code]true[/code], the focused state will not be shown (see [method Control.grab_focus]). See also [member keep_editing_on_text_submit].

members.name: GetMenu
members.summary: Returns the [PopupMenu] of this [LineEdit]. By default, this menu is displayed when right-clicking on the [LineEdit]. You can add custom menu items or remove standard ones. Make sure your IDs don't conflict with the standard ones (see [enum MenuItems]). For example: [codeblocks] [gdscript] func _ready(): var menu = get_menu() # Remove all items after "Redo". menu.item_count = menu.get_item_index(MENU_REDO) + 1 # Add custom items. menu.add_separator() menu.add_item("Insert Date", MENU_MAX + 1) # Connect callback. menu.id_pressed.connect(_on_item_pressed) func _on_item_pressed(id): if id == MENU_MAX + 1: insert_text_at_caret(Time.get_date_string_from_system()) [/gdscript] [csharp] public override void _Ready() { var menu = GetMenu(); // Remove all items after "Redo". menu.ItemCount = menu.GetItemIndex(LineEdit.MenuItems.Redo) + 1; // Add custom items. menu.AddSeparator(); menu.AddItem("Insert Date", LineEdit.MenuItems.Max + 1); // Add event handler. menu.IdPressed += OnItemPressed; } public void OnItemPressed(int id) { if (id == LineEdit.MenuItems.Max + 1) { InsertTextAtCaret(Time.GetDateStringFromSystem()); } } [/csharp] [/codeblocks] [b]Warning:[/b] This is a required internal node, removing and freeing it may cause a crash. If you wish to hide it or any of its children, use their [member Window.visible] property.

members.name: GetNextCompositeCharacterColumn
members.summary: Returns the correct column at the end of a composite character like ❤️‍🩹 (mending heart; Unicode: [code]U+2764 U+FE0F U+200D U+1FA79[/code]) which is comprised of more than one Unicode code point, if the caret is at the start of the composite character. Also returns the correct column with the caret at mid grapheme and for non-composite characters. [b]Note:[/b] To check at caret location use [code]get_next_composite_character_column(get_caret_column())[/code]

members.name: GetPreviousCompositeCharacterColumn
members.summary: Returns the correct column at the start of a composite character like ❤️‍🩹 (mending heart; Unicode: [code]U+2764 U+FE0F U+200D U+1FA79[/code]) which is comprised of more than one Unicode code point, if the caret is at the end of the composite character. Also returns the correct column with the caret at mid grapheme and for non-composite characters. [b]Note:[/b] To check at caret location use [code]get_previous_composite_character_column(get_caret_column())[/code]

members.name: GetScrollOffset
members.summary: Returns the scroll offset due to [member caret_column], as a number of characters.

members.name: GetSelectedText
members.summary: Returns the text inside the selection.

members.name: GetSelectionFromColumn
members.summary: Returns the selection begin column.

members.name: GetSelectionToColumn
members.summary: Returns the selection end column.

members.name: HasImeText
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user has text in the [url=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Input_method]Input Method Editor[/url] (IME).

members.name: HasRedo
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if a "redo" action is available.

members.name: HasSelection
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user has selected text.

members.name: HasUndo
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if an "undo" action is available.

members.name: InsertTextAtCaret
members.summary: Inserts [param text] at the caret. If the resulting value is longer than [member max_length], nothing happens.

members.name: IsEditing
members.summary: Returns whether the [LineEdit] is being edited.

members.name: IsMenuVisible
members.summary: Returns whether the menu is visible. Use this instead of [code]get_menu().visible[/code] to improve performance (so the creation of the menu is avoided).

members.name: MenuOption
members.summary: Executes a given action as defined in the [enum MenuItems] enum.

members.name: Select
members.signature: public void Select(int from, int to)
members.summary: Selects characters inside [LineEdit] between [param from] and [param to]. By default, [param from] is at the beginning and [param to] at the end. [codeblocks] [gdscript] text = "Welcome" select() # Will select "Welcome". select(4) # Will select "ome". select(2, 5) # Will select "lco". [/gdscript] [csharp] Text = "Welcome"; Select(); // Will select "Welcome". Select(4); // Will select "ome". Select(2, 5); // Will select "lco". [/csharp] [/codeblocks]

members.name: SelectAll
members.summary: Selects the whole [String].

members.name: Unedit
members.summary: Allows exiting edit mode while preserving focus.

members.name: Alignment
members.summary: The text's horizontal alignment.

members.name: BackspaceDeletesCompositeCharacterEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code] and [member caret_mid_grapheme] is [code]false[/code], backspace deletes an entire composite character such as ❤️‍🩹, instead of deleting part of the composite character.

members.name: CaretBlink
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], makes the caret blink.

members.name: CaretBlinkInterval
members.summary: The interval at which the caret blinks (in seconds).

members.name: CaretColumn
members.summary: The caret's column position inside the [LineEdit]. When set, the text may scroll to accommodate it.

members.name: CaretForceDisplayed
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the [LineEdit] will always show the caret, even if not editing or focus is lost.

members.name: CaretMidGrapheme
members.summary: Allow moving caret, selecting and removing the individual composite character components. [b]Note:[/b] [kbd]Backspace[/kbd] is always removing individual composite character components.

members.name: ClearButtonEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the [LineEdit] will show a clear button if [member text] is not empty, which can be used to clear the text quickly.

members.name: ContextMenuEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the context menu will appear when right-clicked.

members.name: DeselectOnFocusLossEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the selected text will be deselected when focus is lost.

members.name: DragAndDropSelectionEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], allow drag and drop of selected text.

members.name: DrawControlChars
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], control characters are displayed.

members.name: Editable
members.summary: If [code]false[/code], existing text cannot be modified and new text cannot be added.

members.name: EmojiMenuEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], "Emoji and Symbols" menu is enabled.

members.name: ExpandToTextLength
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the [LineEdit] width will increase to stay longer than the [member text]. It will [b]not[/b] compress if the [member text] is shortened.

members.name: Flat
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the [LineEdit] doesn't display decoration.

members.name: IconExpandMode
members.summary: Define the scaling behavior of the [member right_icon].

members.name: KeepEditingOnTextSubmit
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the [LineEdit] will not exit edit mode when text is submitted by pressing [code]ui_text_submit[/code] action (by default: [kbd]Enter[/kbd] or [kbd]Kp Enter[/kbd]).

members.name: Language
members.summary: Language code used for line-breaking and text shaping algorithms. If left empty, the current locale is used instead.

members.name: MaxLength
members.summary: Maximum number of characters that can be entered inside the [LineEdit]. If [code]0[/code], there is no limit. When a limit is defined, characters that would exceed [member max_length] are truncated. This happens both for existing [member text] contents when setting the max length, or for new text inserted in the [LineEdit], including pasting. If any input text is truncated, the [signal text_change_rejected] signal is emitted with the truncated substring as a parameter: [codeblocks] [gdscript] text = "Hello world" max_length = 5 # `text` becomes "Hello". max_length = 10 text += " goodbye" # `text` becomes "Hello good". # `text_change_rejected` is emitted with "bye" as a parameter. [/gdscript] [csharp] Text = "Hello world"; MaxLength = 5; // `Text` becomes "Hello". MaxLength = 10; Text += " goodbye"; // `Text` becomes "Hello good". // `text_change_rejected` is emitted with "bye" as a parameter. [/csharp] [/codeblocks]

members.name: MiddleMousePasteEnabled
members.summary: If [code]false[/code], using middle mouse button to paste clipboard will be disabled. [b]Note:[/b] This method is only implemented on Linux.

members.name: PlaceholderText
members.summary: Text shown when the [LineEdit] is empty. It is [b]not[/b] the [LineEdit]'s default value (see [member text]).

members.name: RightIcon
members.summary: Sets the icon that will appear in the right end of the [LineEdit] if there's no [member text], or always, if [member clear_button_enabled] is set to [code]false[/code].

members.name: RightIconScale
members.summary: Scale ratio of the icon when [member icon_expand_mode] is set to [constant EXPAND_MODE_FIT_TO_LINE_EDIT].

members.name: Secret
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], every character is replaced with the secret character (see [member secret_character]).

members.name: SecretCharacter
members.summary: The character to use to mask secret input. Only a single character can be used as the secret character. If it is longer than one character, only the first one will be used. If it is empty, a space will be used instead.

members.name: SelectAllOnFocus
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the [LineEdit] will select the whole text when it gains focus.

members.name: SelectingEnabled
members.summary: If [code]false[/code], it's impossible to select the text using mouse nor keyboard.

members.name: ShortcutKeysEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], shortcut keys for context menu items are enabled, even if the context menu is disabled.

members.name: StructuredTextBidiOverride
members.summary: Set BiDi algorithm override for the structured text.

members.name: StructuredTextBidiOverrideOptions
members.summary: Set additional options for BiDi override.

members.name: Text
members.summary: String value of the [LineEdit]. [b]Note:[/b] Changing text using this property won't emit the [signal text_changed] signal.

members.name: TextDirection
members.summary: Base text writing direction.

members.name: VirtualKeyboardEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the native virtual keyboard is enabled on platforms that support it.

members.name: VirtualKeyboardShowOnFocus
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the native virtual keyboard is shown on focus events on platforms that support it.

members.name: VirtualKeyboardType
members.summary: Specifies the type of virtual keyboard to show.

signals.name: EditingToggled
signals.summary: Emitted when the [LineEdit] switches in or out of edit mode.

signals.name: TextChangeRejected
signals.summary: Emitted when appending text that overflows the [member max_length]. The appended text is truncated to fit [member max_length], and the part that couldn't fit is passed as the [param rejected_substring] argument.

signals.name: TextSubmitted
signals.summary: Emitted when the user presses the [code]ui_text_submit[/code] action (by default: [kbd]Enter[/kbd] or [kbd]Kp Enter[/kbd]) while the [LineEdit] has focus.

values.name: EXPAND_MODE_FIT_TO_LINE_EDIT
values.summary: Scale the right icon to fit the LineEdit.

values.name: EXPAND_MODE_FIT_TO_TEXT
values.summary: Scale the right icon's size to match the size of the text.

values.name: EXPAND_MODE_ORIGINAL_SIZE
values.summary: Use the original size for the right icon.

values.name: MENU_CUT
values.summary: Cuts (copies and clears) the selected text.

values.name: MENU_EMOJI_AND_SYMBOL
values.summary: Opens system emoji and symbol picker.

values.name: MENU_INSERT_LRE
values.summary: Inserts start of left-to-right embedding (LRE) character.

values.name: MENU_INSERT_LRO
values.summary: Inserts start of left-to-right override (LRO) character.

values.name: MENU_INSERT_RLE
values.summary: Inserts start of right-to-left embedding (RLE) character.

values.name: MENU_INSERT_RLO
values.summary: Inserts start of right-to-left override (RLO) character.

values.name: MENU_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum MenuItems] enum.

values.name: MENU_PASTE
values.summary: Pastes the clipboard text over the selected text (or at the caret's position). Non-printable escape characters are automatically stripped from the OS clipboard via [method String.strip_escapes].

values.name: KEYBOARD_TYPE_EMAIL_ADDRESS
values.summary: Virtual keyboard with additional keys to assist with typing email addresses.

values.name: KEYBOARD_TYPE_NUMBER
values.summary: Virtual number keypad, useful for PIN entry.

values.name: KEYBOARD_TYPE_NUMBER_DECIMAL
values.summary: Virtual number keypad, useful for entering fractional numbers.

values.name: KEYBOARD_TYPE_PASSWORD
values.summary: Virtual keyboard for entering a password. On most platforms, this should disable autocomplete and autocapitalization. [b]Note:[/b] This is not supported on Web. Instead, this behaves identically to [constant KEYBOARD_TYPE_DEFAULT].

values.name: KEYBOARD_TYPE_URL
values.summary: Virtual keyboard with additional keys to assist with typing URLs.

constants.name: MENU_CUT
constants.summary: Cuts (copies and clears) the selected text.

constants.name: MENU_PASTE
constants.summary: Pastes the clipboard text over the selected text (or at the caret's position). Non-printable escape characters are automatically stripped from the OS clipboard via [method String.strip_escapes].

constants.name: MENU_INSERT_LRE
constants.summary: Inserts start of left-to-right embedding (LRE) character.

constants.name: MENU_INSERT_RLE
constants.summary: Inserts start of right-to-left embedding (RLE) character.

constants.name: MENU_INSERT_LRO
constants.summary: Inserts start of left-to-right override (LRO) character.

constants.name: MENU_INSERT_RLO
constants.summary: Inserts start of right-to-left override (RLO) character.

constants.name: MENU_EMOJI_AND_SYMBOL
constants.summary: Opens system emoji and symbol picker.

constants.name: MENU_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum MenuItems] enum.

constants.name: KEYBOARD_TYPE_NUMBER
constants.summary: Virtual number keypad, useful for PIN entry.

constants.name: KEYBOARD_TYPE_NUMBER_DECIMAL
constants.summary: Virtual number keypad, useful for entering fractional numbers.

constants.name: KEYBOARD_TYPE_EMAIL_ADDRESS
constants.summary: Virtual keyboard with additional keys to assist with typing email addresses.

constants.name: KEYBOARD_TYPE_PASSWORD
constants.summary: Virtual keyboard for entering a password. On most platforms, this should disable autocomplete and autocapitalization. [b]Note:[/b] This is not supported on Web. Instead, this behaves identically to [constant KEYBOARD_TYPE_DEFAULT].

constants.name: KEYBOARD_TYPE_URL
constants.summary: Virtual keyboard with additional keys to assist with typing URLs.

constants.name: EXPAND_MODE_ORIGINAL_SIZE
constants.summary: Use the original size for the right icon.

constants.name: EXPAND_MODE_FIT_TO_TEXT
constants.summary: Scale the right icon's size to match the size of the text.

constants.name: EXPAND_MODE_FIT_TO_LINE_EDIT
constants.summary: Scale the right icon to fit the LineEdit.
